title: Canonical Tax Facts and Evidence Log Schema - Tax Year 2025
description: Canonical self-prep return model for a TY2025 consumer tax engine that performs its own calculations, supports federal plus all 50 states as plugin-scaffold jurisdictions, and hands compiled filings to a filing-only partner.

state_returns.description: Optional state-return records keyed by two-letter state code; any subset of the 50 states may be present.

stateCode.description: Two-letter U.S. state code. Excludes DC because the requested blueprint was for all 50 states.

storageUri.description: Opaque storage key, vault token, object-store URI, or partner reference. Avoid storing secrets inline.

tinLike.description: Generic TIN/ITIN/ATIN/EIN/SSN slot; prefer vault tokens in production.

provenanceIndex.description: Maps a JSON Pointer path in this document to one or more provenance records explaining where the fact came from.

state_specific_fact_bag.description: Cross-jurisdiction extension point for facts not standardized in this schema. Use namespaced keys such as CA.schedule_ca.addition_codes.

plugin_fact_bag.description: State-specific facts that do not fit the cross-state normalized model. This is where each state plugin can stash custom fields, line mappings, and intermediate values.
